## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] If I added an API endpoint, I documented it in `ARCHITECTURE.md` §2/§3
- [ ] If I added an external host, I updated `figma-plugin/manifest.json` `allowedDomains`
- [ ] If I made an architectural choice, I added an ADR under `docs/adrs/`
- [ ] No secrets in code, test fixtures, or commit messages
- [ ] No `--no-verify` commits in this branch
